description: Top-down AML family taxonomy. This is metadata and audit structure first; detector thresholds remain in code or future detector configs.

wordnet.source_note: Use WordNet verb/activity-noun synsets to propose candidate labels and synonyms; do not promote words to AML families without motion evidence mapping. WordNet is queried only by the offline builder, never during AML extraction.
wordnet.runtime_policy: AML runtime reads the cached JSON if needed and must not import nltk or query WordNet.

internvid.source_note: Use InternVid human-subject activity sentences as broad lexical coverage evidence, then map phrases to AML taxonomy parents.

hml3d_captions.source_note: Use HML3D captions for task-local weak labels and coverage audit, not as the sole taxonomy source.

ROOT_LOCOMOTION.label: root locomotion and path
ROOT_LOCOMOTION.scope: Root translation, in-place gait, turning paths, and recovery steps.

VERTICAL_IMPULSE.label: vertical impulse and ballistic motion
VERTICAL_IMPULSE.scope: Jumps, hops, vertical cycles, and jump-plus-translation patterns.

BODY_LEVEL_POSTURE.label: body level and posture
BODY_LEVEL_POSTURE.scope: Low-body posture, squat, lunge, sit/stand, torso lean, and body-level transitions.

GROUND_PRONE_KNEEL.label: ground, prone, kneel, and fall recovery
GROUND_PRONE_KNEEL.scope: Motions close to or on the floor, kneeling, prone support, crawling, falling, and getting up.

UPPER_LIMB_GESTURE.label: upper-limb gesture and hand proximity
UPPER_LIMB_GESTURE.scope: Unilateral and bimanual arm motion, hand-high states, arm circles, claps, and hand-to-face/head proxies.

LOWER_LIMB_ACTION.label: lower-limb action
LOWER_LIMB_ACTION.scope: Kicks, raised-leg poses, footwork fragments, and lower-limb actions not explained by gait.

BILATERAL_RHYTHMIC_EXERCISE.label: bilateral rhythmic exercise
BILATERAL_RHYTHMIC_EXERCISE.scope: Repeated bilateral arm-leg coordination such as jumping jacks, jump rope, and cheer-like repeated gestures.
mutual_exclusion_notes: Prefer ARM_CIRCLE_CANDIDATE over BILATERAL_RHYTHMIC_COORDINATION when arm cycling is unilateral and vertical evidence is weak.
Prefer JUMP_ROPE_CANDIDATE over BILATERAL_RHYTHMIC_COORDINATION when arm-cycle evidence is circular/low and leg motion is hopping rather than arm raise-spread.
Prefer SWIM_LIKE_MOTION_CANDIDATE or PRONE_ARM_LEG_MOTION_CANDIDATE when body level is prone or torso-forward floor-like.

ROTATION_SPIN.label: rotation and spin
ROTATION_SPIN.scope: Root/body turns, in-place spin, turn segments, and rotational path evidence.

ACROBATICS_INVERSION.label: acrobatics and inversion
ACROBATICS_INVERSION.scope: Cartwheel, handspring, backflip-like, and inverted-body candidate motions.

ACTIVITY_INTENT_PROXY.label: activity-level and intent proxy
ACTIVITY_INTENT_PROXY.scope: Composed activity names whose exact label often needs object/context but should still keep AML motion evidence.

UNKNOWN_OR_FALLBACK.label: unknown or fallback
UNKNOWN_OR_FALLBACK.scope: Fallback signatures, subtle state, or sequences that have not been assigned to a stable AML family.
